mapper.select: SELECT user_id, provider, provider_user_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, status, created_at, last_login_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT user_id, provider, provider_user_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, status, created_at, last_login_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_id, provider, provider_user_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, status, created_at, last_login_at FROM users WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( provider, provider_user_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, status, created_at, last_login_at ) VALUES ( #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{profileImageUrl}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'USER'), COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), #{createdAt}, #{lastLoginAt} )
